title: Cross-Domain Exception & Incident Nerve Center
guardrails: Packets are advisory: Control Tower exceptions, assistant incidents, merges, owners, customer/carrier drafts, Twin acknowledgements, invoices, and integration runs stay human-approved.
Queue review and approve actions write audit events and may enqueue AssistantActionQueueItem rows — they never close recovery work, send communications, or mutate operational records silently.

steps: Sign in with Control Tower or reports edit access.
Open /assistant/incident-nerve-center and click Create Sprint 17 packet.
Confirm AssistantIncidentNerveCenterPacket persists with nerveScore and dimensional JSON.
scenarios.passWhen: POST create_packet returns 201 and GET lists the packet without merging incidents or updating CtException rows.

steps: Queue incident command review with optional note.
scenarios.passWhen: Status REVIEW_QUEUED and audit answerKind sprint17_incident_rev recorded.

steps: Approve packet after command staff sign-off.
Verify sprint17_incident_ok audit narrative denies automatic merges or communications.
